overall.description: A cinematic drive through the Rocky Ridge shantytown in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a large welcome billboard, desert landscape, and makeshift industrial buildings during golden hour. The camera moves steadily along a worn asphalt road with power lines and distant mountains visible.

events.description: passing the large Welcome to Rocky Ridge billboard on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert road toward the settlement entrance

entered.detail: large weathered billboard with yellow text reading WELCOME TO ROCKY RIDGE against desert backdrop
tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires lining the left side of the road
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon against the sunset sky
hazy desert mountains forming the backdrop behind the settlement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert road during golden hour, approaching the Rocky Ridge settlement. A large welcome billboard dominates the right side while power lines recede into the distance on the left. The camera drives forward, passing the billboard as futuristic city towers glimmer on the horizon beyond the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: shantytown main road with industrial structures

agents.ego_description: continuing through the settlement entrance with makeshift buildings visible on both sides

entered.detail: large yellow industrial structure with corrugated metal walls and multiple levels
tall palm tree standing near the yellow building

segments.scene_description: Having passed the welcome sign, the road continues through the shantytown with the large yellow industrial building growing prominent on the right. Power lines now run overhead, and makeshift residential structures line both sides of the worn asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense shantytown street with digital advertisements

events.description: passing a glowing digital advertisement board displaying a face on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving deeper into the settlement, passing digital billboards and solar-paneled rooftops

entered.detail: illuminated digital billboard showing a portrait advertisement with bright white light
black solar panel arrays mounted on the rooftops of shanty buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the denser part of the settlement, passing a glowing digital billboard on the right and solar panels on the left rooftops. The yellow industrial building recedes into the distance as the road continues through the makeshift residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from an open desert expanse into the dense, makeshift architecture of the Rocky Ridge shantytown during the golden hour. It begins on a worn asphalt road, passing a large welcome billboard on the right while futuristic city towers glimmer on the horizon beyond distant mountains. As the camera moves forward, the open landscape shifts into a settlement where a prominent yellow industrial building emerges on the right and power lines begin to stretch overhead. The scene then transitions into a denser residential area, passing a glowing digital billboard and rooftops lined with solar panels. Finally, the yellow industrial building recedes into the distance as the camera continues its steady progression through the crowded makeshift structures.
